summary:
- publisher=splash247.com, title=One LNG transit, zero breakthrough in Hormuz crisis, directness=high, why=confirms rare LNG transit occurred amid ongoing crisis, while US-Iran peace talks collapsed; exact cue: “One LNG transit, zero breakthrough in Hormuz crisis” and “I have just read the response from Iran’s so-called ‘Representa...” — signals diplomatic stalemate and fragile operational opening, next=https://splash247.com/one-lng-transit-zero-breakthrough-in-hormuz-crisis/  
- publisher=splash247.com, title=US launches Project Freedom to guide ships out of Hormuz, directness=high, why=establishes US military response (Project Freedom) as active but contested; cue: “deploying a vast array of naval and air assets to escort stranded commercial vessels” — confirms operational scale and immediate sabotage context, next=https://splash247.com/us-launches-project-freedom-to-guide-ships-out-of-hormuz/  
- publisher=splash247.com, title=Hormuz toll authority goes live, directness=high, why=Iran institutionalized toll collection as coercive tool; cue: “unveiled a formal toll collection authority for the waterway” — signals escalation beyond attacks into systemic economic control, next=https://splash247.com/hormuz-toll-authority-goes-live/  
- publisher=splash247.com, title=US protection plan fails to calm Hormuz nerves, directness=high, why=confirms Project Freedom’s suspension after 2 days due to Iranian attacks; cue: “shipowners remain deeply cautious” and “Iran launched a wide-ranging missile and drone...” — validates operational failure and persistent threat, next=https://splash247.com/us-protection-plan-fails-to-calm-hormuz-nerves/  
- publisher=splash247.com, title=Gunboat diplomacy returns to Hormuz, directness=high, why=confirms kinetic escalation: US Navy disabled Iranian VLCC Hasna with 20mm cannon for breaching blockade; cue: “fired its 20 mm cannon at the ship’s rudder” — establishes new threshold of force, next=https://splash247.com/gunboat-diplomacy-returns-to-hormuz/  
- publisher=splash247.com, title=Hormuz crisis intensifies, directness=medium, why=provides context for volatility: alternating closures/attacks/boarding in prior days; supports pattern of instability preceding May events, next=https://splash247.com/hormuz-crisis-intensifies/
